meaning: n.比例,均衡,面积,部分vt.使成比例,使均衡,分摊
examples: The head is out of proportion with the body.
A large proportion of old people live alone.
To my eye , the windows seem out of proportion.
Add their French-born children, and the proportion of the dark-skinned is a lot higher still.
The nodules are known to contain up to 28% metal - 10 times the proportion found on land.
